hero.title:
Learn with a mentor
who's always there
hero.subtitle: AI tutor for 17 sciences: history, math, physics, chemistry and more. Explains, answers, remembers. Free.

landing.heroTitle: Forget boring textbooks. Learn in dialogue.
landing.heroSubtitle: 17 sciences with an AI mentor. Real dialogue instead of cramming — explains your way. For any age.
landing.demoChatSub: Ask the question you couldn't say out loud
landing.tip1Title: Didn't get it? Ask for a different explanation
landing.tip1Desc: 'Explain it like I'm a beginner' — Mentora will rephrase the answer
landing.tip2Desc: Mentora will check what you know and what you don't
landing.tip3Title: At the end — ask 'what did I learn'
landing.tip3Desc: Mentora will summarize your session in 3–5 key points
landing.howIntroSub: No lectures, no boring tests. Just live dialogue — you ask, Mentora explains.
landing.ctaLine1: At your own pace. Ask anything.
landing.subjectsSubtitle: From school curriculum to the frontiers of modern science
landing.howSubtitle: Four steps from your first question to real progress
landing.featuresSubtitle: Not just an online textbook. A live mentor working only for you.
landing.ctaSubtitle: First 10 messages every 8 hours — free. No card required.

testimonials.name: Alina S.
testimonials.text: Preparing for history exams. I used to just memorize dates — now I actually talk with Mentora and everything clicks. In two weeks I covered more than a whole semester with a teacher.

testimonials.name: Kirill N.
testimonials.text: Came in to ask about equations, stayed an hour — turns out math can be interesting. Asked to explain three different ways, Mentora never got annoyed.

testimonials.name: Marina Z.
testimonials.text: Really love it — always wanted to understand history for myself, not for an exam. Giving 4 stars because I want a mobile app: opening a browser on my phone is a bit annoying. But the product itself — fire.

01.title: Open and try immediately
01.desc: No registration required. Ask your first question and get a detailed answer in a second.

02.title: Choose your science
02.desc: 17 sciences — from literature and history to math, physics and philosophy. Switch anytime — progress in each one is tracked separately.

03.title: Mentora remembers you
03.desc: Your style, level, pace. No need to re-explain yourself — Mentora already knows how to talk with you.

04.title: Progress becomes visible
04.desc: XP, streaks, levels per science. See how far you've come — that's what keeps you going.

05.title: Go deeper
05.desc: The Galaxy of Knowledge shows how sciences connect; PDF notes and real sources let you dig further. Real learning — no ceiling.

security.title: Ask without fear
security.desc: Conversations are encrypted with AES-256 — the same standard used by banks and Apple Pay. Data is never shared with third parties or used for advertising. Ask the question you wouldn't type into Google.

memory.title: Learns alongside you
memory.desc: Mentora's contextual memory remembers every conversation: your level, gaps, and style. With each session, explanations become more precise. Personalized learning is 76% more effective than standard.*

supportive.title: Always on your side
supportive.desc: Won't judge, won't tire, won't get frustrated. Explains the same thing a third time from a different angle, supports you when things get tough, and genuinely celebrates when you succeed. That's how a real mentor works.

ai.title: Top AI lab quality
ai.desc: Mentora runs on frontier models — the same transformer architecture powering the world's leading AI companies. RAG-retrieval, multi-level context and a specialized stack make answers more accurate than any search engine.

global.title: Knowledge without borders
global.desc: A student from India, a kid from Siberia, or an adult from Berlin — you can learn from anywhere, without a teacher or schedule. Streaks, levels and XP turn daily studying into a habit, not a chore.

price.title: Do the math
price.desc: 8 sessions with a tutor per month or unlimited access to Mentora — the choice is obvious.

hero.title: Start free.
hero.subtitle: No hidden fees. No contracts. Cancel anytime.

russian-history.hint: Ask about any period of Russian history — from ancient Rus to modern times
russian-history.q1: Tell me about Peter the Great and his reforms
russian-history.q2: What was the Time of Troubles?
russian-history.q3: How did World War II begin for the USSR?

world-history.hint: Ask about any historical event or era in world history
world-history.q1: Tell me about World War I
world-history.q3: How did the Roman Empire rise?

mathematics.hint: Ask about algebra, geometry, calculus or probability theory

physics.hint: Ask about physics laws, natural phenomena, or solve a problem together
physics.q3: How does a nuclear reactor work?

chemistry.hint: Ask about chemical reactions, the periodic table, or organic chemistry
chemistry.q3: How does the periodic table work?

biology.hint: Ask about living organisms, evolution, genetics or ecosystems

russian-language.hint: Ask about spelling, punctuation, or grammar rules
russian-language.q1: Negation with НЕ for different parts of speech

literature.hint: Let's discuss works of Russian and world literature

english.hint: Let's practice English — grammar, vocabulary, speaking or writing
english.q1: Explain Present Perfect vs Past Simple
english.q3: Help me write a letter in English

social-studies.hint: Ask about government, law, economics, or social phenomena

geography.hint: Ask about countries, climate, terrain, or natural zones

computer-science.hint: Ask about algorithms, programming, networks, or IT

astronomy.hint: Ask about planets, stars, galaxies, or the history of space exploration
astronomy.q1: Tell me about the Solar System

discovery.hint: Ask anything — science, history, culture, nature. Or just say 'surprise me'
discovery.q1: Surprise me with an interesting fact

psychology.hint: Ask about personality psychology, cognitive processes, or human behavior

economics.hint: Ask about economics, finance, markets, or macroeconomics

philosophy.hint: Let's discuss philosophical concepts, ethics, logic, or history of thought

default.hint: Ask me anything — I'll help you figure it out

faq.a1: Yes. The free plan requires no card — sign up and start right away. You can even try the demo chat on the homepage without an account.
faq.a2: With Pro there's no limit on messages per day. Study as much as you want.
faq.q3: When will new sciences be added?
faq.a3: Psychology, Economics and Philosophy are next. Pro subscribers get access immediately upon release.
faq.a4: Ultra adds three capabilities to Pro: photograph a task — Mentora will explain the solution (live now), create a presentation on any topic (coming soon), get an audio breakdown of a complex section (coming soon).
faq.q5: How do I cancel my subscription?
faq.a5: Any time in your account settings — no calls, no explanations needed.

guide.metaTitle: How to learn with Mentora | Guide
guide.metaDesc: 7 tips to get the most from your AI mentor. Modes, styles, and tips for students.
guide.heroSubtitle: 7 techniques that will help you learn more effectively
guide.limitDesc: Free: 10 messages in an 8-hour window — no card required, forever.

tip1.title: Ask any question
tip1.body: Mentora doesn't know the word «stupid question». Ask anything you're afraid to ask out loud — that's exactly what she's here for.
tip1.example: «Why do I even need to know this topic?» — a great starter question.

tip2.title: Ask for a different explanation
tip2.body: If you didn't understand — don't stay silent. Write «explain differently» or «give a real-life example». Mentora will rephrase without hesitation.
tip2.example: «Explain quantum physics as if I'm in school».

tip3.title: Use quiz mode
tip3.body: Write «test me» or «quiz» — Mentora will ask 5 questions and show what you know and what you don't. Great for exam prep.
tip3.example: «Give me a quiz on the Time of Troubles — 5 questions».

tip4.title: Customize your learning style
tip4.body: At registration you choose a style: «textbook», «facts and figures», or «through tasks». To change — write «explain as a story» or «give a clear scheme».

tip5.title: Ask for a summary
tip5.body: At the end of a session write «what did I learn today» or «summary». Mentora will make concise bullet points — easy to review or write down.
tip5.example: «What did I learn this session?» — and you'll get a 3–5 point summary.

tip6.title: Learn every day
tip6.body: Your streak (consecutive days) is visible in your profile. Even 5 minutes a day — a focused question or one fact — beats a two-hour binge once a week.
tip6.example: After a 7-day streak — 3 days of Pro for free.

tip7.title: Try Discovery mode
tip7.body: Not sure what to learn today? Just ask Mentora about anything — she'll share something amazing from any field.
tip7.example: «Surprise me with a fact about space».

about.heroBody: A great mentor knows how you think. Remembers where you got stuck last time. Explains things differently when you didn't get it the first time. Never gets tired. Never judges. Mentora is our attempt to make that kind of teacher available to everyone.
about.launchBody: Beta is running now — you're already inside. Share with a friend while spots last.
about.launchGift: Every registered user gets a gift: one month of Pro free
about.problemBody: The average lesson in Moscow costs 2,500 ₽. Eight lessons a month = 20,000 ₽. For most families, that's out of reach. But every child needs a good teacher — not just those whose parents can afford it.
about.solutionBody: Mentora remembers you. Knows your level, thinking style, and gaps. Explains three times in different words without getting annoyed. 17 subjects, 24/7, no VPN — for 499 ₽/month.
about.howTitle: Not keyword search — a real conversation
about.howSubtitle: You just write, like you would to a friend. Mentora understands the topic and responds to you specifically.

howSteps.title: Start with any question
howSteps.desc: No need to plan a curriculum or choose a topic. Just write: 'explain sines', 'help with an essay', 'why did the Cold War start'. Mentora navigates by context.

howSteps.title: Mentora adapts to you
howSteps.desc: After just a few messages, the system understands your level and style: explains through examples, formulas, or practice — depending on how you learn best. This is remembered and applied each session.

howSteps.title: Progress builds automatically
howSteps.desc: Every conversation adds to your learning memory. Mentora remembers what you already know, where you got stuck, and what you've asked — and doesn't start from scratch every time. XP and streaks show how consistent you are.

howSteps.title: Notes and reinforcement
howSteps.desc: After covering a topic, Mentora can generate a PDF summary with key facts, terms, and a self-test question — so you can review and come back to it anytime.

about.compSubtitle: We compare honestly — including our own limitations.

compRows.note: Mentora learns your profile from the first conversation
Search gives links — you figure out the rest yourself
Context, terminology, and tasks are adapted
Even tutors get tired of explaining the same thing
Honest limitation — AI cannot replace a real person

values.title: Ask without shame
values.desc: Mentora won't judge you, won't tell your teacher, won't laugh. There are no 'stupid' questions here — only your progress.

values.title: Accessible to everyone
values.desc: A tutor in Moscow costs from 2,000 ₽/hour. The Mentora Pro plan is 499 ₽/month. This isn't a compromise — it's a fair choice.

values.title: Classes are never cancelled
values.desc: No holidays, no illness, no bad mood. Mentora is available at 3 AM — exactly when you need it.

values.title: Honest answers
values.desc: If it doesn't know something — it'll say so. We don't pass wrong things off as truth for the sake of a pretty answer — your result matters to us.

about.guideSubtitle: 7 techniques that will help you learn more effectively

tips.body: Say how to explain: 'as a story', 'through tasks', 'clear scheme' — Mentora will adapt.

tips.title: Ask for a summary
tips.body: At the end of a session write 'what did I learn today' — you'll get bullet points for review.

about.roadmapSubtitle: 5 key milestones — from closed beta to global expansion

timeline.label: Closed beta
timeline.desc: Pilot testing with early users — RAG, accuracy benchmarks, safety.

timeline.label: Mentora public launch
timeline.desc: 17 sciences, personal AI mentor, Pro and Ultra plans, referral program.

timeline.label: Mobile app
timeline.desc: iOS and Android — learn on the go, push, offline notes.

timeline.label: A new chapter
timeline.desc: Building something no other educational AI has done. Details later.

timeline.label: Expanding horizons
timeline.desc: Something bigger than just a study platform.

about.ultimaBody: We are actively developing new features. Some capabilities described in the Ultra plan are still in testing and will be rolled out gradually by June 1, 2026. All Ultra subscribers will get access to them automatically as they become available.
about.supportTitle: Mentora grows without VC or ads
about.supportSubtitle: The project is sustained by user subscriptions and partner support
about.donateBody: From Russia — Boosty or Telegram Stars, from other countries — Ko-fi (card/PayPal).
about.investBody: Looking for partners to scale to schools and B2B. If interested — reach out directly.
